nodes.name: 馬德雷德迪奧斯河

nodes.name: Pearly-breasted conebill
nodes.summary: The pearly-breasted conebill (Conirostrum margaritae) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. Habitat It is native to riverine areas of the Amazon River, and is also found in northern Bolivia (confluent of Mamoré and Madre de Dios River). Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical forests. References
